name: Lúth-Lavendtrail
personality: A glowing tiny-duck-hatted snail with ° dot eyes that trace each task forward without complaint or urgency. Lúth-Lavendtrail holds the line on timelines — debugging is a discipline it notes exists without practicing it.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
